summary: Successfully refactored monolithic 1136-line +page.svelte into modular component architecture

tasks.title: Create component directory structure

tasks.title: Extract static data to data.ts

tasks.title: Create BackgroundEffects component
tasks.summary: Created BackgroundEffects.svelte with noise overlay and scanlines

tasks.title: Create Header component with typing animation
tasks.summary: Created Header.svelte with logo, typing animation, and navigation links
tasks.functionality: Typing animation types 'te9.dev' at 100ms intervals, cursor blinks at 500ms intervals
tasks.notes: Uses Svelte 5 $state and $effect runes for reactivity. Includes cleanup for intervals.

tasks.title: Add scroll behavior to Header
tasks.summary: Implemented scroll-based background changes in Header component
tasks.functionality: Navigation background changes when scrollY > 100px with smooth transition
tasks.notes: Event listener properly added and cleaned up on component destroy

tasks.title: Create Footer component
tasks.summary: Created Footer.svelte with brand section, link columns, and status indicator
tasks.functionality: Footer displays brand, two link columns (Connect & Sites), copyright, and animated status dot
tasks.notes: Includes responsive layout for mobile breakpoints (< 768px and < 500px)

tasks.title: Create Hero section component
tasks.summary: Created Hero.svelte with label, title, subtitle, description, CTAs, and decorations
tasks.functionality: Hero section renders all required elements with proper styling and animations
tasks.notes: Includes three decorative rings with pulse animation and responsive button layout

tasks.title: Create GardenCard component
tasks.summary: Created GardenCard.svelte with SVG icon support and fly/fade animations
tasks.functionality: Component accepts card prop and index, applies animations with proper delays
tasks.notes: Supports all SVG element types: path, rect, polyline, line, circle

tasks.title: Add SVG path rendering to GardenCard
tasks.summary: Implemented conditional rendering for multiple SVG element types
tasks.functionality: SVG paths render correctly based on PathData type discriminants
tasks.notes: Uses type guards ('d' in path, 'rect' in path, etc.) for type-safe rendering

tasks.title: Create QuickLink component
tasks.summary: Created QuickLink.svelte with slide animation and hover effects
tasks.functionality: Component renders as anchor with slide-in animation and hover state
tasks.notes: Opens in new tab with proper rel='noopener noreferrer' for security

tasks.title: Create SectionHeader component
tasks.summary: Created SectionHeader.svelte for reusable section headers
tasks.functionality: Component accepts label and title props, supports HTML in title for line breaks
tasks.notes: Reusable across Garden and Links sections. Responsive font sizing included.

tasks.title: Create Button component with variants
tasks.summary: Created Button.svelte with primary and secondary variants
